# Skolyoz Serisi — Derleme (2026-03-15)

> Bu içerik otomatik derlenmiştir. Tıbbi öneri yerine geçmez; kişisel durumunuz için uzmana danışınız.

## 🔬 Hakemli Makaleler (PubMed)

### An effective active self-correction in standing without external aids is possible in adolescents with idiopathic scoliosis: a cross-sectional study.
- **Türkçe özet:** Bu içerik an effective active self-correction in standing without external aids is possible in adolescents with idiopathic skolyoz: a cross-sectional study. konusuna odaklanıyor. Öne çıkan başlıklar: european spine journal : official publication of the european spine society, the european spinal deformity society, and the european section of the cervical spine research society. 2026 mar 9. Anahtar kavramlar: european, spine, society, effective, active, self.
- **Kaynak:** https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/41801401/

### Mental and physical quality of life among patients with scoliosis in Jordan: a cross-sectional study.
- **Türkçe özet:** Bu içerik mental and physical quality of life among patients with skolyoz in jordan: a cross-sectional study. konusuna odaklanıyor. Öne çıkan başlıklar: international journal of adolescent medicine and health. 2026 mar 9. Anahtar kavramlar: mental, physical, quality, life, among, patients.
- **Kaynak:** https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/41791229/
